## 4. Success Criteria (Kapan Disebut Tuntas)

Sesuai Master Map §Success Conditions + JVTO success condition di CLAUDE.md §12:

|---|---|

| **Satu sumber kebenaran** | Tidak ada `import { TOURS } from '@/lib/jvtoData'` di `app/**/page.tsx`; hanya helper data-access |
| **17/17 modul package page** | Checklist manual di 3 paket (bromo-2d1n, ijen-2d1n, full-expedition) |
| **Route Seriousness visible** | Chip muncul di `/tours`, setiap TourCard, dan package hero |
| **Media registry enforced** | CI script `audit-media` green |
| **AI-readability** | `curl llms.txt` + `curl ai-agent-config.json` masih OK + tambah field `live_data.volcano_status` pointing ke `/api/volcano` |
| **Build reliable** | `npm run build` + `npm run audit:prd` + `npm run audit:jsonld` semua green tanpa exclude-hacks |
| **User sampai 4 kesimpulan** (CLAUDE.md §12) | Test manual: halaman paket → user lihat diff + proof + fit + booking path tanpa friction |

---

## 5. Verifikasi End-to-End

```bash
# Lint & types
npm run lint
npx tsc --noEmit          # harus green SETELAH excludes dikembalikan

# Audits
npm run audit:prd         # PRD compliance
npm run audit:jsonld      # JSON-LD build

# Data
npm run db:migrate        # sprint C butuh ini (add_ons column)
npm run db:seed           # isi sample add-ons

# Tests
npm run test              # vitest

# Build & smoke
npm run build
npm run start
# curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/volcano | jq .    # MAGMA live
# curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/tours | jq '. | length'   # harus 22, bukan 19
# curl -s http://localhost:3000/llms.txt | grep -i magma      # claim + link konsisten
```

---

## 6. Urutan Eksekusi yang Disarankan

Sprint A (Klaim ≠ Kenyataan) **→** Sprint B (Data Unifikasi) **→** Sprint C (Package page tuntas) **→** Sprint D (Cleanup) **→** Sprint E (CMS).

**Jangan lompat Sprint A.** Kalau MAGMA + aggregateRating masih bohong, semua kerja visual/struktur di Sprint C tidak berguna karena AI engines (Perplexity, ChatGPT, Claude) akan mendiskualifikasi JVTO dari jawaban volcano tour queries karena "low factual reliability signal".

---

## 7. Yang TIDAK Dilakukan (Out of Scope Sekarang)

- Rebuild visual identity — sudah aligned dengan Master Map §3

- Blog/guide expansion (Phase E) — tunda sampai Phase D stabil
- Ganti PostgreSQL ke DB lain — wiring sudah benar, tinggal dipakai

### SPRINT E — "Phase D Foundation (CMS)" — 2–3 hari kerja

**Goal:** Mulai Phase D sesuai CLAUDE.md roadmap — tapi pragmatis.

- Evaluasi: Payload CMS vs. Sanity vs. Keystone untuk self-hosted on PostgreSQL yang sudah ada
- Rekomendasi awal: **Payload CMS** — jalan di PostgreSQL existing, admin UI bagus, TypeScript-native, deploy di same Next.js app
- Scope awal: Tours, Destinations, Reviews, Crew (bukan seluruh content)
- **Jangan** migrasi semua halaman ke CMS dulu — jalankan dual (static pages + CMS-backed listings) sampai authoring workflow terbukti

**Critical files:** `payload.config.ts` (baru), `app/(payload)/**` (baru), `collections/*.ts` (baru)

## 4. Success Criteria (Kapan Disebut Tuntas)

Sesuai Master Map §Success Conditions + JVTO success condition di CLAUDE.md §12:

| **Satu sumber kebenaran** | Tidak ada `import { TOURS } from '@/lib/jvtoData'` di `app/**/page.tsx`; hanya helper data-access |

| **AI-readability** | `curl llms.txt` + `curl ai-agent-config.json` masih OK + tambah field `live_data.volcano_status` pointing ke `/api/volcano` |
| **Build reliable** | `npm run build` + `npm run audit:prd` + `npm run audit:jsonld` semua green tanpa exclude-hacks |
| **User sampai 4 kesimpulan** (CLAUDE.md §12) | Test manual: halaman paket → user lihat diff + proof + fit + booking path tanpa friction |


## 6. Urutan Eksekusi yang Disarankan

Sprint A (Klaim ≠ Kenyataan) **→** Sprint B (Data Unifikasi) **→** Sprint C (Package page tuntas) **→** Sprint D (Cleanup) **→** Sprint E (CMS).

**Jangan lompat Sprint A.** Kalau MAGMA + aggregateRating masih bohong, semua kerja visual/struktur di Sprint C tidak berguna karena AI engines (Perplexity, ChatGPT, Claude) akan mendiskualifikasi JVTO dari jawaban volcano tour queries karena "low factual reliability signal".

# JVTO — Audit Konsolidasi & Roadmap Strategis

**Input:** `E:\Users\JAVA VOLCANO\Downloads\JVTO MASTER MAP.md` + kode aktual + memory project
**Tanggal audit:** 2026-04-19
**Branch:** main (clean)

---

## Context / Kenapa Ini Dibuat

User mengupload **JVTO MASTER MAP.md** (4 lapisan: Strategy, Structure, Visual, Data + Strategic Framework 7-seksi "Trust-First Architecture"). Master Map ini adalah ringkasan tertinggi dari arah strategis JVTO. Tugas: audit proyek aktual vs Master Map, konsolidasi temuan, identifikasi pain point, dan tetapkan langkah eksekusi yang realistis sampai tuntas.

Proyek JVTO sudah berada di tahap **Phase B (Core Commercial) berjalan** dan **Phase C (Technical Optimization) selesai**. Fondasinya kuat (30+ halaman, JSON-LD hardened, llms.txt, robots.txt), tetapi ada **kesenjangan antara klaim dokumen dan implementasi** yang jika tidak ditutup akan merusak seluruh narasi "trust-first, machine-readable, verifiable".

---

## 1. Korelasi Master Map ⇄ Kondisi Aktual

| Layer Master Map | Klaim Master Map | Kondisi Aktual Proyek | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Strategy – Guardian-grade trust + package-first** | 5-layer architecture (Trust Entry → Discovery → Package → Support → Proof) | Semua 5 layer ada, 30+ halaman lengkap | ✅ Aligned |
| **Structure – Homepage** | Hero → Trust → Discovery → CTA | 18 seksi berjalan di `app/page.tsx`, semua trust signals hadir | ✅ Aligned |
| **Structure – Tours hub** | Origin-based grouping + Route Seriousness System | Origin hubs (Surabaya/Bali) sudah ada; **"Route Seriousness" tidak eksplisit** (hanya implisit di field `physicality`) | ⚠ Partial |
| **Structure – Package page 17-modul** | Hero → … → Add-ons → Verify CTA → FAQ → Final CTA | **15/17 modul ada**; modul **Add-ons** dan **explicit Verify-before-book CTA** belum dirender | ⚠ Gap |
| **Visual – Navy/Orange/Lime + Raleway/Inter/JetBrains Mono** | Sistem warna + tipografi terkunci | Token CSS benar di `app/globals.css`; tidak ada hex hardcode di komponen | ✅ Aligned |
| **Data – SSOT + Media Registry** | `ssot-media-registry.ts` sebagai SSOT | **Tidak di-enforce** — 22 occurrence `home.webp` tersebar di 12 file pages bypass registry | ❌ Broken |
| **Data – MAGMA Bromo & Ijen live** | "Volcano status updated before every departure" (CLAUDE.md, llms.txt, ai-agent-config.json) | **LiveSignalBlock.tsx baris 14-29 HARDCODED** ("Level II Waspada", "Level I Normal"). `new Date()` hanya merender timestamp cek palsu. Tidak ada fetcher MAGMA. | ❌ Critical lie |
| **Data – PostgreSQL migration** | "Future CMS/PostgreSQL is planned" | **Sudah lebih jauh dari klaim**: DB `jvto_dev` live (22 packages), API routes `/api/tours`, `/api/destinations`, `/api/reviews/database`, Redis cache — **tetapi halaman masih import `lib/jvtoData.ts` statis (19 tours)** | ⚠ Dual-source |
| **Data – Reviews** | Trustpilot 4.9/112 + Guardian trust | `/why-jvto/reviews/page.tsx` sudah DB-backed dengan fallback; crew profiles punya `forensicReviewQuote` real. `siteConfig.aggregateRating` hardcoded 4.9/112 (lastUpdated 2026-03-01, stale). | ⚠ Partial |
| **Technical – JSON-LD + Schema** | TravelAgency, TouristTrip, Person, Book, MedicalWebPage | Semua sudah di `components/JsonLd.tsx` (1,309 LOC) | ✅ Aligned |
| **Technical – llms.txt + robots.txt + ai-agent-config** | AI/GEO readable | Semua file ada dan lengkap; `public/.well-known/ai-agent-config.json` live + API route duplicate | ✅ Aligned |

---

## 2. Pain Points (Tuntas-wajib, Urut Prioritas)

### P0 — Klaim tidak konsisten dengan implementasi (risiko trust & AI hallucination)

| # | Pain Point | Bukti | Dampak |
|---|---|---|---|
| **P0.1** | **MAGMA live claim vs data hardcoded** | `components/LiveSignalBlock.tsx:14-29` array statis. `public/llms.txt`, `CLAUDE.md`, `ai-agent-config.json` semua mengklaim live. | AI crawler akan menyimpulkan JVTO sumber data tidak akurat → kepercayaan entitas rusak. YMYL kategori (volcano tour) punya guardrail ketat. |
| **P0.2** | **`aggregateRating` hardcoded & stale** | `lib/siteConfig.ts` — 4.9/112 reviews, `lastUpdated 2026-03-01` (48 hari lalu) | Schema.org AggregateRating di JSON-LD dan halaman ikut stale. |
| **P0.3** | **Exchange rates stale** | `lib/siteConfig.ts` — USD 16250, EUR 17800, updated 2026-03-01 | Harga konversi salah → hesitation booking. |

### P1 — Arsitektur data dual-source (sumber kebenaran ambigu)

| # | Pain Point | Bukti | Dampak |
|---|---|---|---|
| **P1.1** | **`jvtoData.ts` (19 tours) ≠ DB (22 packages)** | `CONSOLIDATION_ANALYSIS.md` dokumentasi; kode: halaman masih `import { TOURS } from '@/lib/jvtoData'` bukan `fetch('/api/tours')` | 3 paket hilang dari site; inkonsistensi harga/image. |
| **P1.2** | **Image governance broken** | `home.webp` muncul 22x di 12 halaman (`app/travel-guide/page.tsx` 5x, `app/why-jvto/our-story/page.tsx` 3x, dll.). `ssot-media-registry.ts` tidak dipakai. | Banyak halaman menampilkan placeholder yang sama; AI agent akan flag sebagai "low-quality content". |
| **P1.3** | **`package_images` DB ada, belum tersambung ke UI** | Database punya 5-6 gambar unik per paket; `TourCard.tsx` pakai `tour.image` tunggal dari TS statis. | Gallery tour hanya 1 foto alih-alih 5-6. |

### P2 — Gap struktur (Master Map Structure belum 100%)

| # | Pain Point | Bukti | Dampak |
|---|---|---|---|
| **P2.1** | **Package page: 2/17 modul absen** | Tidak ada section **Add-ons** & **Verify-before-book CTA eksplisit** di `app/tours/[slug]/page.tsx` + `TourDetailClient.tsx` | Upsell hilang; jembatan ke `/verify-jvto` lemah di momen keputusan. |
| **P2.2** | **Route Seriousness System tidak eksplisit** | `app/tours/page.tsx` pakai `physicality` string bebas, bukan UI label berjenjang (Easy/Moderate/Serious/Expedition) | Discovery Cluster Master Map §3 tidak tercapai — user masih butuh baca copy untuk self-screen. |
| **P2.3** | **10 halaman tidak punya `generateMetadata`** | `/contact`, `/destinations`, `/policy/*`, `/tours/from-surabaya`, `/tours/from-bali` pakai metadata root template saja | Title/description generic → SEO & social preview buruk. |

### P3 — Technical debt yang menahan kecepatan

| # | Pain Point | Bukti | Dampak |
|---|---|---|---|
| **P3.1** | **TypeScript excludes diperluas** | Commits `7aadf51`, `6b4f8df` — test files + config files di-exclude dari TS build | Error test tidak terlihat saat build; regresi tidak ketangkap. |
| **P3.2** | **Firebase dead code** | `firebase.ts`, `firebase-*.json`, `firebase-tools` terinstall — **zero import** di kode page/component | Bundle size, confusing stack, security surface tidak perlu. |
| **P3.3** | **Folder `Redisgn Website JVTO`** (typo) kosong | 3 subfolder kosong: `destinations/`, `reviews/`, `tours/` | Artifact basi; bikin bingung. |
| **P3.4** | **Test coverage minim** | Hanya `Hero.test.tsx` + `TourCard.test.tsx` | Refactor berisiko silent-break. |
| **P3.5** | **Tidak ada `loading.tsx` / `error.tsx`** di route utama | Hanya `app/not-found.tsx` global | UX kosong saat fetch API lambat/gagal. |

---

## 3. Langkah Strategis (Roadmap Eksekusi, Urut Priority Fixed dari Master Map §7)

> **Metode:** Improve-in-Place. Jangan rebuild. Tutup gap dari P0 dulu (integritas klaim) → P1 (data truth) → P2 (UX struktur) → P3 (maintainability).

### SPRINT A — "No Lies" (Integritas Trust) — 1–2 hari kerja

**Goal:** Nol klaim bohong. Apa yang dibilang di CLAUDE.md, llms.txt, dan JSON-LD harus sama dengan yang di-render user/crawler.

1. **[P0.1] MAGMA live fetcher**
   - Buat `lib/magma.ts` — fetcher ke `https://magma.esdm.go.id/v1/...` (atau scrape resmi) untuk Bromo & Ijen
   - Buat `app/api/volcano/route.ts` — proxy + cache Redis (TTL 3600s, sudah ada `CACHE_TTL_VOLCANO` di `lib/cache.ts`)
   - `components/LiveSignalBlock.tsx` → async RSC atau client fetch ke `/api/volcano`; hapus array statis `VOLCANO_STATUSES`
   - **Kriteria selesai:** tampilan menunjukkan timestamp fetch nyata + data dari API; fallback graceful jika API down (tampil "Last verified: X, source: MAGMA" + link resmi)
   - **Jika MAGMA API bermasalah / tidak publik:** turunkan klaim di CLAUDE.md §7 & llms.txt menjadi "manual verification before each departure with reference link" — konsisten dengan kode

2. **[P0.2] Reviews aggregate dari DB**
   - Ganti `SITE_CONFIG.aggregateRating` statis → helper `getAggregateRating()` di `lib/siteConfig.ts` yang baca dari `/api/reviews/database` atau langsung `lib/db.ts`
   - `components/JsonLd.tsx` → AggregateRating schema baca dari helper ini di build/RSC time
   - **Kriteria selesai:** angka rating & jumlah review refleksi real-time dari PostgreSQL

3. **[P0.3] Exchange rates refresh**
   - Buat `scripts/refresh-exchange-rates.ts` + cron (via `scheduled-tasks` MCP atau Vercel cron) harian
   - Simpan ke Redis key `exchange_rates` + `exchange_rates_updated_at`; `siteConfig` helper baca dari cache
   - **Kriteria selesai:** harga konversi selalu < 24 jam umur

**Critical files:** `components/LiveSignalBlock.tsx`, `lib/siteConfig.ts`, `components/JsonLd.tsx`, `lib/cache.ts`, `app/api/volcano/route.ts` (baru), `lib/magma.ts` (baru)

---

### SPRINT B — "One Source of Truth" (Unifikasi Data) — 3–4 hari kerja

**Goal:** Halaman membaca dari PostgreSQL + API routes, bukan `lib/jvtoData.ts`. `jvtoData.ts` jadi fallback/seed saja.

1. **[P1.1] Migrate tour pages to API**
   - `app/tours/page.tsx`, `app/tours/[slug]/page.tsx`, `app/tours/from-surabaya/page.tsx`, `app/tours/from-bali/page.tsx` → ganti `import { TOURS } from '@/lib/jvtoData'` dengan `await fetch('/api/tours')` (RSC) atau helper `getTours()` di `lib/data-access.ts` yang baca DB langsung
   - `app/sitemap.ts` → baca dari DB supaya 22 packages (bukan 19) masuk
   - **Validation:** jalankan `npm run audit:prd` + bandingkan output dengan `/api/tours`; zero drift

2. **[P1.2] Enforce media registry**
   - Tambah util `lib/ssot-media-registry.ts::getHeroFor(zone, slug)` yang error di dev jika asset tidak terdaftar
   - Ganti semua 22 occurrence `home.webp` di `app/**/page.tsx` dengan panggilan registry
   - Tambah script `scripts/audit-media.ts` → CI gate yang fail kalau `home.webp` dipakai selain di `SITE_CONFIG.defaultHero`
   - **Kriteria selesai:** `grep -r "home.webp" app/` hanya muncul di registry, bukan di page code

3. **[P1.3] Wire package_images DB → gallery**
   - Perluas `/api/tours/[slug]` untuk return array `images[]` (sudah JSON agg di query SQL)
   - `components/TourCard.tsx` → pakai `images[0]` sebagai card; `TourDetailClient.tsx` gallery render semua 5-6 images
   - Migrasi Next `<Image>` dengan remotePatterns untuk `/uploads/` dan `/img/destinations/`

**Critical files:** `lib/data-access.ts` (baru), `app/tours/[slug]/page.tsx`, `components/TourCard.tsx`, `components/TourDetailClient.tsx`, `lib/ssot-media-registry.ts`, `next.config.mjs`, `scripts/audit-media.ts` (baru)

### SPRINT C — "Close the 17-Module Package Page" — 1–2 hari kerja

**Goal:** Halaman paket 100% modular sesuai Master Map §Package Page Structure Logic.

1. **[P2.1] Add-ons module**
   - Schema: tambah field `addOns: { id, label, priceIDR, description }[]` di `packages` DB (migration `npm run db:migrate`)

   - Mapping dari field `physicality` yang sudah ada
   - UI chip dengan warna (green/amber/orange/red-ish) + tooltip; render di tour cards + package hero + tours hub filter

4. **[P2.3] Metadata untuk 10 halaman**
   - Tambah `export const metadata` atau `generateMetadata` di: `/contact`, `/destinations`, `/policy/*` (4), `/tours/from-surabaya`, `/tours/from-bali`, `/travel-guide/*` yang kurang

**Critical files:** `components/PackageAddOns.tsx` (baru), `components/VerifyBeforeBook.tsx` (baru), `components/RouteSeriousnessChip.tsx` (baru), `lib/jvto-taxonomy.ts` (baru), `app/tours/[slug]/page.tsx`, `app/contact/page.tsx`, `app/destinations/page.tsx`, `app/policy/*/page.tsx`, `app/tours/from-*/page.tsx`

content.content:
1	# **JVTO Unified Commercial System: Strategic Blueprint for Trust-Led Digital Growth**
2	
3	### **1\. The Strategic Transformation: From Fragmented Pages to Unified System**
4	
5	The transition currently underway for JVTO is far more than a aesthetic redesign; it is the construction of a systematic digital foundation designed for a high-stakes adventure operator. In the premium volcanic expedition market, we operate on the principle of "Emotion First, Logic Second." The digital experience must first capture the visceral wonder of the journey before satisfying the traveler’s need for absolute safety. This transformation moves JVTO from a collection of isolated pages to a unified commercial engine where structural unity mirrors the operational precision required in the field.
6	
7	The reconstruction is anchored by four primary strategic objectives:
8	
9	* **Professional Authority:** Establishing JVTO as a legitimate, professional operator by clearly defining the product, the individual accountability of the leadership, and the formal legal/safety frameworks (Licensed PT status) supporting every tour.  
10	* **Human and AI Trust:** Engineering the site to be equally readable by high-intent travelers and AI-driven search agents. We are moving beyond keywords to "Entity Verification," ensuring JVTO is recognized as a real-world organization with verifiable experts and real-time operational data.  
11	* **Systemic Architecture:** Replacing fragmented content with a consistent, interconnected hierarchy that guides the user from emotional discovery to logistical verification without friction.  
12	* **Single Source of Truth (SSOT):** Centralizing all operational assets—from MAGMA Bromo/Ijen data to licensed medical certifications—into a single data layer. This ensures that the "Guardian-Grade" information provided to a guest is always current, accurate, and consistent across every touchpoint.
13	
14	These objectives serve as the bedrock for a commercial system that transforms high-risk curiosity into high-confidence bookings through technical and narrative excellence.
15	
16	### **2\. Dual-Audience Architecture: Human Users and AI Engines**
17	
18	In a digital-first market, "Machine Trust" is the prerequisite for "Human Trust." While a traveler seeks emotional resonance and visual evidence of safety, AI engines and search algorithms demand data consistency and entity verification. By designing for both audiences simultaneously, JVTO ensures it is not only discoverable but is also categorized as a high-authority "Entity" within the volcanic tourism sector.
19	
20	**The Dual-Audience Mapping**
21	
22	| Human Trust Signal | AI/Entity Signal |
23	| :---- | :---- |
24	| **Founder Photos & Narrative** (Agung Sambuko) | **Entity Consistency:** Linking the founder to the brand via Schema.org identity protocols to establish person-to-organization authority. |
25	| **Expert Guides & Named Crew Profiles** | **Expertise Signals:** Author/Expert Person Entities (Schema.org) connecting physical field expertise to digital content quality. |
26	| **Licensed Doctor & Ijen Health Screening** | **Medical Specificity:** Structured data regarding health protocols and professional medical certifications (E-A-T signals). |
27	| **Live Operational Data** (MAGMA Bromo/Ijen) | **Freshness Signals:** Real-time API data and timestamps indicating active, expert monitoring of physical environments. |
28	| **Legal/External Proof** (Trustpilot/Press) | **Authority Signals:** Validated external links and mentions that establish brand reputation through third-party "votes of confidence." |
29	
30	This dual-readability ensures that the commercial system remains a persuasive sales tool for humans while functioning as a reliable, authoritative data source for search engines.
31	
32	### **3\. Page Hierarchy and Cluster Roles**
33	
34	To eliminate user confusion and prevent content overlap, every page within the JVTO system is assigned a strict commercial role. This hierarchy ensures the user (and AI) always understands their location in the "Trust-to-Transaction" journey.
35	
36	* **Homepage (The Commercial Gateway):** Answers "What is this?" and "Why should I trust it?" within seconds. It serves as the emotional hook and provides immediate entry points into the sales funnel without being cluttered by forensic details.  
37	* **Tours & Destinations (The Conversion Engines):** High-intent pages designed for package discovery and comparison. These are the primary "bookable" interfaces focused on commercial clarity.  
38	* **Verify-JVTO (The Trust Verification Hub):** A dedicated center for radical transparency, housing legal proof, safety certifications, and operational evidence for trust-sensitive guests who require deep verification.  
39	* **Travel-Guide (The Operational Preparedness Center):** Provides the technical and logistical knowledge necessary for guests to prepare for the physical rigors of a volcanic tour, establishing JVTO as an expert educator.  
40	* **Why-JVTO (The Human Authority & Narrative Core):** The home for the brand’s "reason for being," highlighting the founder, the team expertise, and the unique value proposition of our expedition model.  
41	* **Policy (The Formal Governance Layer):** Acts as a "compression layer" for the forensic legal, police-led context, and safety data. By isolating these heavy technical requirements here, the rest of the site maintains its premium expedition aesthetic while remaining fully transparent.
42	
43	This structure ensures that high-value "Premium Expedition" aesthetics are never compromised by the necessary "Forensic Audit" data, which is organized and accessible for those who seek it.
44	
45	### **4\. Guardian-Grade Trust Infrastructure**
46	
47	In volcanic tourism, safety is the primary currency. "Guardian-Grade Trust" refers to a digital infrastructure that provides undeniable proof of operational responsibility, drastically reducing booking friction for high-stakes adventures.
48	
49	* **Founder Context:** Agung Sambuko serves as the human face of JVTO. By attaching personal accountability to the brand, we shift from an anonymous company to a leader-led organization where safety is a personal promise.  
50	* **Medical Specificity & Legal Context:** We emphasize our **Licensed PT (Limited Liability Company)** status and **Police-led context** for safety. The integration of licensed doctors for Ijen health screenings signals a level of professional oversight that exceeds industry norms.  
51	* **Live Operational Data:** The use of MAGMA Bromo and Ijen data serves as "Proof of Freshness." It demonstrates that JVTO is not just a booking agent, but an active monitor of the volcanic environment in real-time.  
52	* **Legal/External Proof:** Synthesizing Trustpilot reviews, press mentions, and legal licensing into a cohesive "Proof Rail" provides the external validation needed to finalize high-value bookings.
53	
54	These signals are integrated throughout the site architecture, providing a continuous "safety net" that reinforces the user’s confidence at every stage of the funnel.
55	
56	### **5\. Self-Service Adventure Commerce: The Package Experience**
57	
58	The JVTO commercial strategy utilizes a "Package-First" logic where emotional desire is met immediately with practical, self-service clarity. This flow ensures that the user can navigate the complexities of a volcanic expedition without needing to engage in high-touch manual support.
59	
60	**Standardized Package Page Flow:**
61	
62	1. **Hero:** High-impact visual and emotional hook (The "Adventure First" entry).  
63	2. **Structured Route Data:** Quick-scan technical details (Duration, Start point, Base price).  
64	3. **Visual Gallery:** Immersive, high-quality evidence of the expedition experience.  
65	4. **Route Seriousness & Rhythm:** Defining the physicality, difficulty, and day-to-day tempo of the trek to ensure "Route Fit."  
66	5. **Logistics (Hotel/Vehicle):** Setting clear expectations for accommodation quality and transport standards.  
67	6. **Ijen Readiness:** Specific health screening and safety protocols (where applicable).  
68	7. **Pricing & Add-ons:** Transparent commercial breakdown to prevent "hidden fee" anxiety.  
69	8. **CTA:** Direct, high-contrast path to booking or inquiry.  
70	9. **Closest Alternatives:** Intelligent cross-selling to keep the user within the JVTO ecosystem.  
71	10. **Proof Rail:** Re-insertion of trust signals (Live MAGMA data/Doctor context) at the final point of decision.
72	
73	This flow transforms a tour package into a "self-service brochure," empowering the user to make a confident, adult decision based on serious operational data.
74	
75	### **6\. Art Direction: "Premium Expedition" Visual Language**
76	
77	The visual identity of JVTO is defined as "Premium Expedition"—an "Adult" and "Serious" aesthetic that communicates operational authority. We intentionally avoid the "Fun Travel Blog" look to ensure we are perceived as a serious operator capable of managing volcanic risks.
78	
79	| Component | Visual Goal | Search Keyword Reference |
80	| :---- | :---- | :---- |
81	| **Hero Sections** | Immersive, high-impact, authoritative | premium adventure travel hero design |
82	| **Destination Cards** | Image-led, clear difficulty signaling | travel destination grid ui |
83	| **Trust Metrics** | Discreet but undeniable credibility | luxury adventure tour operator homepage |
84	| **Package Cards** | Clear, "bookable" commercial layout | expedition travel website hero |
85	
86	**Visual Don'ts:**
87	
88	* **Avoid SaaS Dashboards:** No overly technical or sterile interface styles.  
89	* **Avoid Playful Icons:** No "fun" or cartoonish graphics that undermine safety.  
90	* **Avoid Excessive Overlays:** The natural beauty of the landscape must remain the focus.  
91	* **Avoid Bloggy Layouts:** The site must feel like a professional operator, not an editorial magazine.  
92	* **Avoid Ultra-Luxury Resort Polish:** Maintain a "rugged but controlled" feel; we are an expedition brand, not a luxury hotel.
93	
94	Visual refinement is the final layer that communicates the operational trust defined in earlier sections, signaling that the brand is as professional as the expeditions it leads.
95	
96	### **7\. Implementation Roadmap and Priorities**
97	
98	The transition from a "Working Implementation" (build workspace) to a "Live Production-Ready Site" requires a shift from structural development to aesthetic and data-layer polish.
99	
100	**Priorities for the Next Phase:**
101	
102	* **\[ \] Review Live Production:** Conduct rigorous desktop and mobile testing on the live Vercel environment to eliminate UX friction.  
103	* **\[ \] Domain Integration:** Transition from development subdomains to the primary JVTO domain to consolidate brand authority.  
104	* **\[ \] Visual Asset Curation:** Replace all placeholders with high-impact hero images, professional route cards, and authentic proof screenshots.  
105	* **\[ \] Data Layer Optimization (PostgreSQL/CMS):** Finalize the backend management of routes and trust assets for long-term scalability and "Freshness Signal" automation.
106	
107	This roadmap completes the transformation of JVTO into a world-class, trust-verified commercial system, positioning the brand to dominate the premium volcanic tourism market through unwavering operational authority.
108	
109

# **JVTO Unified Commercial System: Strategic Blueprint for Trust-Led Digital Growth**

### **1\. The Strategic Transformation: From Fragmented Pages to Unified System**

The transition currently underway for JVTO is far more than a aesthetic redesign; it is the construction of a systematic digital foundation designed for a high-stakes adventure operator. In the premium volcanic expedition market, we operate on the principle of "Emotion First, Logic Second." The digital experience must first capture the visceral wonder of the journey before satisfying the traveler’s need for absolute safety. This transformation moves JVTO from a collection of isolated pages to a unified commercial engine where structural unity mirrors the operational precision required in the field.

The reconstruction is anchored by four primary strategic objectives:

* **Professional Authority:** Establishing JVTO as a legitimate, professional operator by clearly defining the product, the individual accountability of the leadership, and the formal legal/safety frameworks (Licensed PT status) supporting every tour.  
* **Human and AI Trust:** Engineering the site to be equally readable by high-intent travelers and AI-driven search agents. We are moving beyond keywords to "Entity Verification," ensuring JVTO is recognized as a real-world organization with verifiable experts and real-time operational data.  
* **Systemic Architecture:** Replacing fragmented content with a consistent, interconnected hierarchy that guides the user from emotional discovery to logistical verification without friction.  
* **Single Source of Truth (SSOT):** Centralizing all operational assets—from MAGMA Bromo/Ijen data to licensed medical certifications—into a single data layer. This ensures that the "Guardian-Grade" information provided to a guest is always current, accurate, and consistent across every touchpoint.

These objectives serve as the bedrock for a commercial system that transforms high-risk curiosity into high-confidence bookings through technical and narrative excellence.

### **2\. Dual-Audience Architecture: Human Users and AI Engines**

In a digital-first market, "Machine Trust" is the prerequisite for "Human Trust." While a traveler seeks emotional resonance and visual evidence of safety, AI engines and search algorithms demand data consistency and entity verification. By designing for both audiences simultaneously, JVTO ensures it is not only discoverable but is also categorized as a high-authority "Entity" within the volcanic tourism sector.

**The Dual-Audience Mapping**

| Human Trust Signal | AI/Entity Signal |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Founder Photos & Narrative** (Agung Sambuko) | **Entity Consistency:** Linking the founder to the brand via Schema.org identity protocols to establish person-to-organization authority. |
| **Expert Guides & Named Crew Profiles** | **Expertise Signals:** Author/Expert Person Entities (Schema.org) connecting physical field expertise to digital content quality. |
| **Licensed Doctor & Ijen Health Screening** | **Medical Specificity:** Structured data regarding health protocols and professional medical certifications (E-A-T signals). |
| **Live Operational Data** (MAGMA Bromo/Ijen) | **Freshness Signals:** Real-time API data and timestamps indicating active, expert monitoring of physical environments. |
| **Legal/External Proof** (Trustpilot/Press) | **Authority Signals:** Validated external links and mentions that establish brand reputation through third-party "votes of confidence." |

This dual-readability ensures that the commercial system remains a persuasive sales tool for humans while functioning as a reliable, authoritative data source for search engines.

### **3\. Page Hierarchy and Cluster Roles**

To eliminate user confusion and prevent content overlap, every page within the JVTO system is assigned a strict commercial role. This hierarchy ensures the user (and AI) always understands their location in the "Trust-to-Transaction" journey.

* **Homepage (The Commercial Gateway):** Answers "What is this?" and "Why should I trust it?" within seconds. It serves as the emotional hook and provides immediate entry points into the sales funnel without being cluttered by forensic details.  
* **Tours & Destinations (The Conversion Engines):** High-intent pages designed for package discovery and comparison. These are the primary "bookable" interfaces focused on commercial clarity.  
* **Verify-JVTO (The Trust Verification Hub):** A dedicated center for radical transparency, housing legal proof, safety certifications, and operational evidence for trust-sensitive guests who require deep verification.  
* **Travel-Guide (The Operational Preparedness Center):** Provides the technical and logistical knowledge necessary for guests to prepare for the physical rigors of a volcanic tour, establishing JVTO as an expert educator.  
* **Why-JVTO (The Human Authority & Narrative Core):** The home for the brand’s "reason for being," highlighting the founder, the team expertise, and the unique value proposition of our expedition model.  
* **Policy (The Formal Governance Layer):** Acts as a "compression layer" for the forensic legal, police-led context, and safety data. By isolating these heavy technical requirements here, the rest of the site maintains its premium expedition aesthetic while remaining fully transparent.

This structure ensures that high-value "Premium Expedition" aesthetics are never compromised by the necessary "Forensic Audit" data, which is organized and accessible for those who seek it.

### **4\. Guardian-Grade Trust Infrastructure**

In volcanic tourism, safety is the primary currency. "Guardian-Grade Trust" refers to a digital infrastructure that provides undeniable proof of operational responsibility, drastically reducing booking friction for high-stakes adventures.

* **Founder Context:** Agung Sambuko serves as the human face of JVTO. By attaching personal accountability to the brand, we shift from an anonymous company to a leader-led organization where safety is a personal promise.  
* **Medical Specificity & Legal Context:** We emphasize our **Licensed PT (Limited Liability Company)** status and **Police-led context** for safety. The integration of licensed doctors for Ijen health screenings signals a level of professional oversight that exceeds industry norms.  
* **Live Operational Data:** The use of MAGMA Bromo and Ijen data serves as "Proof of Freshness." It demonstrates that JVTO is not just a booking agent, but an active monitor of the volcanic environment in real-time.  
* **Legal/External Proof:** Synthesizing Trustpilot reviews, press mentions, and legal licensing into a cohesive "Proof Rail" provides the external validation needed to finalize high-value bookings.

These signals are integrated throughout the site architecture, providing a continuous "safety net" that reinforces the user’s confidence at every stage of the funnel.

### **5\. Self-Service Adventure Commerce: The Package Experience**

The JVTO commercial strategy utilizes a "Package-First" logic where emotional desire is met immediately with practical, self-service clarity. This flow ensures that the user can navigate the complexities of a volcanic expedition without needing to engage in high-touch manual support.

**Standardized Package Page Flow:**

1. **Hero:** High-impact visual and emotional hook (The "Adventure First" entry).  
2. **Structured Route Data:** Quick-scan technical details (Duration, Start point, Base price).  
3. **Visual Gallery:** Immersive, high-quality evidence of the expedition experience.  
4. **Route Seriousness & Rhythm:** Defining the physicality, difficulty, and day-to-day tempo of the trek to ensure "Route Fit."  
5. **Logistics (Hotel/Vehicle):** Setting clear expectations for accommodation quality and transport standards.  
6. **Ijen Readiness:** Specific health screening and safety protocols (where applicable).  
7. **Pricing & Add-ons:** Transparent commercial breakdown to prevent "hidden fee" anxiety.  
8. **CTA:** Direct, high-contrast path to booking or inquiry.  
9. **Closest Alternatives:** Intelligent cross-selling to keep the user within the JVTO ecosystem.  
10. **Proof Rail:** Re-insertion of trust signals (Live MAGMA data/Doctor context) at the final point of decision.

This flow transforms a tour package into a "self-service brochure," empowering the user to make a confident, adult decision based on serious operational data.

### **6\. Art Direction: "Premium Expedition" Visual Language**

The visual identity of JVTO is defined as "Premium Expedition"—an "Adult" and "Serious" aesthetic that communicates operational authority. We intentionally avoid the "Fun Travel Blog" look to ensure we are perceived as a serious operator capable of managing volcanic risks.

| Component | Visual Goal | Search Keyword Reference |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| **Hero Sections** | Immersive, high-impact, authoritative | premium adventure travel hero design |
| **Destination Cards** | Image-led, clear difficulty signaling | travel destination grid ui |
| **Trust Metrics** | Discreet but undeniable credibility | luxury adventure tour operator homepage |
| **Package Cards** | Clear, "bookable" commercial layout | expedition travel website hero |

**Visual Don'ts:**

* **Avoid SaaS Dashboards:** No overly technical or sterile interface styles.  
* **Avoid Playful Icons:** No "fun" or cartoonish graphics that undermine safety.  
* **Avoid Excessive Overlays:** The natural beauty of the landscape must remain the focus.  
* **Avoid Bloggy Layouts:** The site must feel like a professional operator, not an editorial magazine.  
* **Avoid Ultra-Luxury Resort Polish:** Maintain a "rugged but controlled" feel; we are an expedition brand, not a luxury hotel.

Visual refinement is the final layer that communicates the operational trust defined in earlier sections, signaling that the brand is as professional as the expeditions it leads.

### **7\. Implementation Roadmap and Priorities**

The transition from a "Working Implementation" (build workspace) to a "Live Production-Ready Site" requires a shift from structural development to aesthetic and data-layer polish.

**Priorities for the Next Phase:**

* **\[ \] Review Live Production:** Conduct rigorous desktop and mobile testing on the live Vercel environment to eliminate UX friction.  
* **\[ \] Domain Integration:** Transition from development subdomains to the primary JVTO domain to consolidate brand authority.  
* **\[ \] Visual Asset Curation:** Replace all placeholders with high-impact hero images, professional route cards, and authentic proof screenshots.  
* **\[ \] Data Layer Optimization (PostgreSQL/CMS):** Finalize the backend management of routes and trust assets for long-term scalability and "Freshness Signal" automation.

This roadmap completes the transformation of JVTO into a world-class, trust-verified commercial system, positioning the brand to dominate the premium volcanic tourism market through unwavering operational authority.

"operational_logic": {
    "financial_policy": {
      "id": "lifetime-travel-credit",
      "title": "Lifetime Travel Credit Guarantee",
      "cutoff_hours": 48,
      "cancellation_gt_48h": "100% value converted to travel credit; cash_refund=false",
      "cancellation_lt_48h": "100% forfeit; travel_credit=false",
      "validity": "Lifetime / Non-expiring",
      "transferability": "Fully Transferable (Can be gifted/sold)",
      "currency": "IDR (Indonesian Rupiah)",
      "reference_policy_url": "/policy/booking-payment-cancellation",
      "evidence_status": {
        "has_hard_asset": false,
        "recommended_verify_url": null
      }
    },
    "health_protocol": {
      "id": "ijen-health-screening",
      "title": "Ijen Digital Health Security System",
      "status": "Mandatory (Non-Negotiable)",
      "authority_ref": "BBKSDA Jawa Timur Regulation & JVTO Internal Safety Protocol",
      "logic_gate": "No Valid QR Code = No Access to Crater Zone.",
      "data_points": [
        "Oxygen Saturation (SpO2)",
        "Blood Pressure (Systolic/Diastolic)",
        "Resting Heart Rate",
        "Respiratory History Check (Asthma/Bronchitis)"
      ],
      "failure_protocol": "Unfit => climb cancellation for individual; Non-refundable; Alternative: wait at base camp / safe zone",
      "proof_assets": [
        "ijen-screening-hotel-01",
        "print-surat-sehat-preview"
      ],
      "system_url": "https://health.mountijen.com",
      "evidence_status": {
        "has_hard_asset": true,
        "recommended_verify_url": "https://javavolcano-touroperator.com/screening/ijen-screening-hotel-01.jpeg"
      }
    },
    "ijen_health_screening": {
      "measured_metrics": [
        "SpO2",
        "Blood Pressure"
      ],
      "optional_future_metrics": [],
      "legal_basis": [
        {
          "id": "bbksda-ticket-terms",
          "source": "BBKSDA East Java ticketing terms (tiket.bbksdajatim.org)",
          "url": "http://tiket.bbksdajatim.org/",
          "supports": "Requirement to be healthy and present a doctor health certificate when purchasing/using Ijen tickets."
        },
        {
          "id": "bbksda-circular-letter-se-1658-2024",
          "source": "Surat Edaran SE.1658/K2/BIDTEK.1/KSA/9/2024 (BBKSDA Jawa Timur)",
          "asset_slug": "bbksda-surat-edaran-se-1658-ksa-9-2024",
          "supports": "Official reopening notice referencing SOP compliance and online ticketing through tiket.bbksdajatim.org."
        }
      ],
      "doctor_verification": {
        "str_lookup_url": "https://satusehat.kemkes.go.id/sdmk/nakes/QN00001073380217",
        "kki_check_url": "https://www.kki.go.id/cekdokter/form",
        "proof_assets": [
          "sip-dr-ahmad-irwandanu-2026",
          "health-screening-form-sample-2026-02-17"
        ]
      }
    }
  },
  "page_architecture": {
    "SSOT_Pages": [
      {
        "route": "/why-jvto",
        "h1": "Why Choose Java Volcano Tour Operator?",
        "hero_subhead": "Built on safety discipline, backed by proof, and delivered by a local East Java team—not just marketing promises.",
        "primary_cta_label": "How to Book & Pay",
        "primary_cta_url": "/travel-guide/booking-information",
        "secondary_cta_label": "Explore Our Trust Stack",
        "secondary_cta_url": "#trust-stack",
        "intro_paragraphs_count": 5,
        "sections_count": 3,
        "links_out_count": 8,
        "links_out_sample": "/travel-guide/booking-information, #trust-stack, /why-jvto/the-jvto-difference, /why-jvto/the-jvto-difference, /why-jvto/our-team, /why-jvto/reviews ..."
      },
      {

        "data_source": "pages[safety-leadership] + pages[proof-transparency]"
      },
      {

## Context / Kenapa Ini Dibuat

User mengupload **JVTO MASTER MAP.md** (4 lapisan: Strategy, Structure, Visual, Data + Strategic Framework 7-seksi "Trust-First Architecture"). Master Map ini adalah ringkasan tertinggi dari arah strategis JVTO. Tugas: audit proyek aktual vs Master Map, konsolidasi temuan, identifikasi pain point, dan tetapkan langkah eksekusi yang realistis sampai tuntas.

Proyek JVTO sudah berada di tahap **Phase B (Core Commercial) berjalan** dan **Phase C (Technical Optimization) selesai**. Fondasinya kuat (30+ halaman, JSON-LD hardened, llms.txt, robots.txt), tetapi ada **kesenjangan antara klaim dokumen dan implementasi** yang jika tidak ditutup akan merusak seluruh narasi "trust-first, machine-readable, verifiable".
input.new_string:
## Context / Kenapa Ini Dibuat

Proyek JVTO sedang ditransformasi dari kumpulan halaman terfragmentasi menjadi **"Unified Commercial System"** (Blueprint §1) yang menjadi satu sistem digital dengan 4 tujuan strategis: Professional Authority, Human & AI Trust, Systemic Architecture, dan Single Source of Truth. Tiga dokumen strategis sekarang menyatu:

- **Master Map** memberi taksonomi 4-layer (Strategy/Structure/Visual/Data) + prioritas eksekusi.
- **Unified Commercial System Blueprint** memperkenalkan pendekatan **"Emotion First, Logic Second"** dan **Dual-Audience Architecture** (Human Trust Signal ↔ AI/Entity Signal table) — ini menegaskan bahwa Machine Trust adalah prasyarat untuk Human Trust.
- **SSOT v4.0 JSON** adalah **registrasi data kanonikal** (51 rute, 9 klaim, 14 crew, 14 kredensial, 52 aset dengan SHA-256). Ini jembatan yang hilang antara strategi dan kode.

Proyek berada di **Phase B (Core Commercial) 🔄 + Phase C (Technical Optimization) ✅**. Fondasinya kuat (30+ halaman, JSON-LD hardened, llms.txt, robots.txt, PostgreSQL live, Redis cache), tetapi ada **tiga kesenjangan sistemik**:

1. **Klaim ≠ Kenyataan** (Trust integrity) — MAGMA "live" faktanya hardcoded; aggregateRating stale.
2. **Data tiga-sumber** — `lib/jvtoData.ts` (19) vs PostgreSQL (22) vs SSOT v4.0 (16 tour + 5 destinasi canonical). Tidak ada satu sumber kebenaran.
3. **SSOT v4.0 belum dipakai kode** — File kanonikal 11,056 baris yang seharusnya jadi driver build-time, faktanya tidak di-import di mana pun.

Jika tiga gap ini tidak ditutup, Blueprint §2 ("Machine Trust is the prerequisite for Human Trust") runtuh — AI engines (Perplexity, ChatGPT, Claude) akan mendiskualifikasi JVTO dari volcano tour queries karena inconsistency entity signal.

input.new_string:
## 0. Konsolidasi Tiga Dokumen Strategis (Konvergensi & Tambahan)

Ketiga dokumen tidak saling bertentangan — mereka **bertingkat**. Master Map adalah taksonomi; Blueprint adalah arahan perilaku; SSOT v4.0 adalah data kanonikal. Konsolidasi:

| Konsep | Master Map | Blueprint | SSOT v4.0 JSON | Di Kode? |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Arsitektur 5-layer** | Trust Entry → Discovery → Package → Support → Proof | Homepage → Tours/Destinations → Verify → Travel-Guide → Why → Policy | `canonical_context.route_owner_map` (51 rute × owner) | ✅ rute fisik ada; ❌ owner map tidak enforced |
| **Trust-First / Guardian-Grade** | "Sells trust" di homepage | "Guardian-Grade Trust Infrastructure" §4 | `narrative_claimmap` C1–C9 + `verification_credentials` (14) | ⚠ claim & evidence ada di UI, tapi **tidak terhubung programmatically** — tiap klaim seharusnya punya chip "verify this" → asset_slug |
| **Dual-Audience (Human + AI)** | "Machine Trust Goal" | Tabel Human Signal ↔ AI Signal §2 | `assets_inventory` SHA-256 + `operational_logic` entity graph | ⚠ JSON-LD sudah ada tapi belum baca SSOT; claim→evidence link hilang |
| **Package-First** | 17-modul package page | Standardized Package Page Flow §5 (10 langkah) | `tour_pages[]` 16 paket terstruktur | ⚠ 15/17 modul ada; **Add-ons + Verify-CTA masih hilang** |
| **SSOT / MAGMA live / Freshness** | "Live operational signals" (Data) | "Proof of Freshness" §4 | `operational_logic.health_protocol.system_url: health.mountijen.com` | ❌ **Belum ada fetcher MAGMA; `health.mountijen.com` tidak terintegrasi** |
| **Ijen Digital Health Security** | Ijen Health Screening mandatory | "Medical Specificity" §4 | `operational_logic.health_protocol.logic_gate: "No Valid QR Code = No Access"` + data_points (SpO2/BP/HR/Respiratory) + `doctor_verification.str_lookup_url` SatuSehat | ⚠ halaman ada; **QR-gate logic + data_points belum dirender**; SatuSehat link belum muncul di public UI |
| **Lifetime Travel Credit Guarantee** | (implisit di Policy) | (implisit di §5 Pricing) | `operational_logic.financial_policy`: 48h cutoff, lifetime validity, transferable | ⚠ di `/policy/booking-payment-cancellation` ada; **belum jadi USP yang surfaced di package page** |
| **Claim-Evidence Mapping** | (implisit) | "Proof Rail re-insertion at decision point" §5 | `narrative_claimmap[].evidence_slugs` → `assets_inventory[].slug` | ❌ **Tidak di-enforce** — tiap klaim narasi di UI tidak punya asset_slug backing |
| **Canonical URL routing** | (tidak eksplisit) | (tidak eksplisit) | `canonical_context.canonical_paths` (51 rute) + `canonical_redirects` (8 redirect 301) | ⚠ **Rute `/tours/[slug]` flat** vs SSOT canonical **`/tours/from-surabaya/[slug]` nested**. Redirects belum di-deploy. |
| **Visual "Premium Expedition"** | Art direction locked | §6 Visual Don'ts eksplisit (no SaaS/playful/bloggy) | (tidak termasuk — bukan scope SSOT) | ✅ CSS tokens aligned; visual assets sebagian placeholder |

### Temuan baru dari Blueprint (tidak ada di Master Map):

1. **"Emotion First, Logic Second"** — homepage hero harus menangkap *wonder* visual dulu, baru logika. Sekarang homepage JVTO berat ke trust signal (19 blok trust) sebelum hero visual landscape punya pernafasan. Risiko: brand terasa *forensic/bureaucratic* alih-alih *expedition*.
2. **Dual-Audience mapping table** (§2) — pairing 1:1 Human Signal ↔ AI/Entity Signal. Operasionalisasi: tiap trust signal di UI **wajib punya sibling Schema.org entity node**. Contoh: Founder photo → Person entity linked ke Organization.
3. **Priority next phase** (§7): (a) Review live production, (b) Domain integration, (c) Visual asset curation, (d) PostgreSQL/CMS optimization. Ini **pragmatik production readiness**, bukan strategi abstrak.

### Temuan baru dari SSOT v4.0 JSON (gold mine yang belum disentuh):

1. **11,056 baris data kanonikal** — di-generate via 5 sprint (sprint_1 sampai sprint_5), status `READY_FOR_IMPLEMENTATION`. **Tidak ada satu baris pun dari `lib/jvtoData.ts` yang mencerminkan data ini.**
2. **9 narrative claims C1–C9** dengan `evidence_slugs` array — ini adalah **trust graph** yang dirujuk Master Map. Masing-masing klaim terhubung ke 3-12 asset di `assets_inventory`. Ini dasar untuk "proof-on-demand" chip di UI.
3. **52 assets_inventory** — tiap aset punya SHA-256, size_bytes, category, slug, geo_context, last_verified_iso. Ini SSOT media registry yang sebenarnya — **lebih lengkap dari `lib/ssot-media-registry.ts`**.
4. **14 verification_credentials** terstruktur (NIB, TDUP, HPWKI, SPRIN, dll). **Lebih detail daripada `lib/verificationData.ts`**.
5. **`operational_logic.health_protocol`** — `logic_gate: "No Valid QR Code = No Access"`, `system_url: https://health.mountijen.com`. Ini **Ijen Digital Health Security System yang sudah ada** tapi belum diintegrasikan ke UI publik.
6. **`operational_logic.financial_policy`** — Lifetime Travel Credit 48h cutoff, transferable. Seharusnya menjadi **headline differentiator** di package page (saat ini tersembunyi di /policy).
7. **Canonical route structure**: SSOT pakai **nested URL `/tours/from-surabaya/bromo-2d1n`**. Proyek saat ini pakai **flat `/tours/bromo-2d1n`**. Implikasi SEO (categorical depth) — perlu keputusan.
8. **5 destinasi canonical** (Bromo, Ijen, Madakaripura, Tumpak Sewu, Papuma). Proyek saat ini punya **7** (termasuk Surabaya-city & Malang-city yang **tidak ada di SSOT canonical**). Status SSOT: "sitemap routes exist but DB has no slug or content yet" — ini sudah diflag di SSOT `v2_verification.open_issues`.
9. **`ijen_health_screening.legal_basis`** — referensi **BBKSDA Surat Edaran SE.1658/K2/BIDTEK.1/KSA/9/2024** dan link SatuSehat untuk `sip-dr-ahmad-irwandanu-2026`. Ini kredibel dan **wajib disurface** di `/travel-guide/ijen-health-screening`.
10. **`canonical_redirects`** — 8 redirect 301 (misal `/reviews → /why-jvto/reviews`, `/team → /why-jvto/our-team`) harus di-deploy sebagai `next.config.mjs` redirects.

---

## 1. Korelasi Master Map ⇄ Kondisi Aktual

+1. **11,056 baris data kanonikal** — di-generate via 5 sprint (sprint_1 sampai sprint_5), status `READY_FOR_IMPLEMENTATION`. **Tidak ada satu baris pun dari `lib/jvtoData.ts` yang mencerminkan data ini.**

+2. **9 narrative claims C1–C9** dengan `evidence_slugs` array — ini adalah **trust graph** yang dirujuk Master Map. Masing-masing klaim terhubung ke 3-12 asset di `assets_inventory`. Ini dasar untuk "proof-on-demand" chip di UI.

+3. **52 assets_inventory** — tiap aset punya SHA-256, size_bytes, category, slug, geo_context, last_verified_iso. Ini SSOT media registry yang sebenarnya — **lebih lengkap dari `lib/ssot-media-registry.ts`**.
+4. **14 verification_credentials** terstruktur (NIB, TDUP, HPWKI, SPRIN, dll). **Lebih detail daripada `lib/verificationData.ts`**.

+5. **`operational_logic.health_protocol`** — `logic_gate: "No Valid QR Code = No Access"`, `system_url: https://health.mountijen.com`. Ini **Ijen Digital Health Security System yang sudah ada** tapi belum diintegrasikan ke UI publik.
+6. **`operational_logic.financial_policy`** — Lifetime Travel Credit 48h cutoff, transferable. Seharusnya menjadi **headline differentiator** di package page (saat ini tersembunyi di /policy).

+7. **Canonical route structure**: SSOT pakai **nested URL `/tours/from-surabaya/bromo-2d1n`**. Proyek saat ini pakai **flat `/tours/bromo-2d1n`**. Implikasi SEO (categorical depth) — perlu keputusan.

+8. **5 destinasi canonical** (Bromo, Ijen, Madakaripura, Tumpak Sewu, Papuma). Proyek saat ini punya **7** (termasuk Surabaya-city & Malang-city yang **tidak ada di SSOT canonical**). Status SSOT: "sitemap routes exist but DB has no slug or content yet" — ini sudah diflag di SSOT `v2_verification.open_issues`.

+9. **`ijen_health_screening.legal_basis`** — referensi **BBKSDA Surat Edaran SE.1658/K2/BIDTEK.1/KSA/9/2024** dan link SatuSehat untuk `sip-dr-ahmad-irwandanu-2026`. Ini kredibel dan **wajib disurface** di `/travel-guide/ijen-health-screening`.
+10. **`canonical_redirects`** — 8 redirect 301 (misal `/reviews → /why-jvto/reviews`, `/team → /why-jvto/our-team`) harus di-deploy sebagai `next.config.mjs` redirects.
## 1. Korelasi Master Map ⇄ Kondisi Aktual
| Layer Master Map | Klaim Master Map | Kondisi Aktual Proyek | Status |

input.new_string:
## 1B. Korelasi Goal-Optimization (Konteks-Penting)

Goal proyek (dari CLAUDE.md §12 + Blueprint §1 + Master Map §12): user mencapai 4 kesimpulan dengan cepat — (1) JVTO berbeda, (2) perbedaannya terbukti, (3) saya tahu paket yang cocok, (4) saya percaya diri mulai booking.

Korelasi tiap dokumen terhadap goal:

| Goal | Driver Utama (dari 3 dokumen) | Kondisi Aktual | Gap vs Goal |
|---|---|---|---|
| **(1) Berbeda** | Blueprint §4 "Founder Context" + Master Map "Police-led + Private-only" | Founder spotlight di homepage ✅; "Tourist Police-led" title tag ✅ | **"Emotion First" hilang** — hero landscape kurang visual impact; founder langsung tampil sebelum rasa wonder terbentuk |
| **(2) Terbukti** | SSOT `narrative_claimmap` C1–C9 + `evidence_slugs` + `verification_credentials` | `/verify-jvto/*` lengkap ✅; tapi klaim di halaman lain **tidak punya link forensik ke asset_slug** | Harusnya ada **"Verify this" inline chip** di tiap klaim homepage/package page → anchor ke proof asset |
| **(3) Paket cocok** | Master Map "Route Seriousness System" + SSOT `tour_pages[].physicality` | `physicality` string bebas di TS; tidak ada UI chip; tidak ada filter by fitness | **Tidak ada self-screening UI**; user harus baca paragraf panjang |
| **(4) Percaya diri booking** | Blueprint §5 "Self-Service Adventure Commerce" + SSOT `operational_logic.financial_policy` (Lifetime Travel Credit) + `health_protocol.logic_gate` | Kebijakan Lifetime Travel Credit ada di /policy; QR gate Ijen tidak terlihat | **USP tersembunyi** — Lifetime Travel Credit + QR Ijen harus muncul di package page sebagai konversi anchor |

**Goal-Optimization Synthesis:** Gap terbesar bukan kurangnya halaman/konten. Gap terbesar adalah **tiga data source tidak nyambung** — tiap gambar, tiap klaim, tiap kredensial di SSOT v4.0 sudah terhubung dengan SHA-256 + route + primary_page, tetapi kode menggunakan data statis terpisah. **Satu langkah besar: jadikan SSOT v4.0 JSON sebagai build-time source of truth.**

---

## 2. Pain Points (Tuntas-wajib, Urut Prioritas)

### P1.5 — SSOT v4.0 JSON tidak digunakan (data gap fundamental)

| # | Pain Point | Bukti | Dampak |
|---|---|---|---|
| **P1.5.1** | **File `JVTO_SSOT_v4_0_CLEAN.json` (11,056 baris, status READY_FOR_IMPLEMENTATION) belum disalin ke repo** | File di `F:\New folder\DOWNLOADS\`, tidak ada di `/lib/` atau `/data/` proyek. `grep -r "ssot_v4" lib/ app/` kosong. | Semua kerja Sprint 1-5 SSOT (yang sudah selesai 2026-03-16) terbuang. 9 narrative claims, 14 credentials, 52 assets, 51 routes — tidak ter-render. |
| **P1.5.2** | **Narrative claims C1–C9 tidak terhubung dengan evidence_slugs** | UI menampilkan teks "Tourist Police-led" tanpa link ke asset `sprin-wal-travel-2024-02-12` yang jadi bukti. | Blueprint §2 Dual-Audience gagal — Human signal ada, AI Entity signal (linked evidence graph) hilang. |
| **P1.5.3** | **Ijen Digital Health Security (`health.mountijen.com` + QR gate)** belum muncul di UI | `operational_logic.health_protocol.system_url` dan `logic_gate` tidak dipanggil di `/travel-guide/ijen-health-screening` | Differentiator safety-gate hilang; kompetitor generic tour operator bisa mengklaim sama. |
| **P1.5.4** | **Route canonical: flat vs nested mismatch** | SSOT: `/tours/from-surabaya/bromo-2d1n` (nested). Kode: `/tours/bromo-2d1n` (flat). | Origin-based SEO taxonomy lebih dangkal; internal linking inconsistent dengan sitemap SSOT. |
| **P1.5.5** | **Destination count: 7 di kode vs 5 di SSOT canonical** | `lib/jvtoData.ts` include Surabaya-city & Malang-city; SSOT explicitly flag: "Surabaya and Malang City: sitemap routes exist but DB has no slug or content yet" | User melihat destinasi yang tidak punya konten berarti; crawler flag thin content. |
| **P1.5.6** | **8 canonical_redirects belum dideploy** | SSOT `canonical_redirects[]`: `/reviews → /why-jvto/reviews`, `/team → /why-jvto/our-team`, dll. Tidak ada di `next.config.mjs`. | Link lama dari email/social/press break → 404 → lost trust. |

### P3 — Technical debt yang menahan kecepatan

input.new_string:
### SPRINT A+ — "Adopt SSOT v4.0 JSON" (Fondasi Data Kanonikal) — 1–2 hari kerja

**Goal:** SSOT v4.0 JSON menjadi build-time source of truth. Kode tidak lagi mengarang data; ia membaca dari SSOT → hydrate DB/render UI.

1. **[P1.5.1] Salin & versiokan SSOT**
   - Salin `JVTO_SSOT_v4_0_CLEAN.json` ke `lib/ssot/jvto-ssot-v4.json`
   - Buat `lib/ssot/index.ts`: TypeScript types + lazy import + helper `getSSOT()`, `getClaim(id)`, `getAsset(slug)`, `getTourPage(route)`, `getDestinationPage(slug)`, `getVerifyPage(slug)`, `getOperationalLogic()`
   - Gunakan TypeScript satisfies + const assertion supaya type-safe — generate dari JSON dengan script `scripts/generate-ssot-types.ts`
   - **Kriteria selesai:** `import { getSSOT } from '@/lib/ssot'` bekerja; `getSSOT().canonical_context.route_count === 51`

2. **[P1.5.2] Wire narrative claims C1–C9 ke UI**
   - Komponen `components/ClaimBadge.tsx` — menerima `claimId` (C1..C9), render copy dari `nlp_variants.short` + chip "Verify" → link ke `primary_page#asset_slug`
   - Ganti string hardcoded di homepage + package page + why-jvto/* dengan `<ClaimBadge claimId="C2" />` dsb
   - **Kriteria selesai:** tiap klaim di UI punya anchor ke minimal 1 asset di `assets_inventory`

3. **[P1.5.6] Deploy canonical_redirects**
   - `next.config.mjs` → `async redirects()` baca dari `getSSOT().canonical_redirects` dan return array `{source, destination, permanent: true}`
   - **Kriteria selesai:** `curl -I https://.../reviews` → 301 ke `/why-jvto/reviews`

**Critical files:** `lib/ssot/jvto-ssot-v4.json` (baru), `lib/ssot/index.ts` (baru), `lib/ssot/types.ts` (baru), `scripts/generate-ssot-types.ts` (baru), `components/ClaimBadge.tsx` (baru), `next.config.mjs` (update), `app/page.tsx`, `app/tours/[slug]/page.tsx`, `app/why-jvto/*/page.tsx`

---

### SPRINT B — "One Source of Truth" (Unifikasi Data) — 3–4 hari kerja

**Goal:** Halaman membaca dari PostgreSQL + API routes (hydrated dari SSOT v4.0), bukan `lib/jvtoData.ts`. Pipeline: **SSOT JSON → sync script → PostgreSQL → API → UI**.

1. **[P1.1] Migrate tour pages to API + resolve count drift**
   - **Resolve source-of-truth conflict**: SSOT v4.0 (16 paket) vs DB (22 paket) vs `jvtoData.ts` (19 paket). Rekomendasi: **SSOT v4.0 sebagai commercial catalog canonical** (16), DB sebagai operational detail (pricing, images, itinerary), `jvtoData.ts` di-deprecate.
   - Script `scripts/sync-ssot-to-db.ts` — baca SSOT JSON, upsert ke `packages` table (match by slug), pertahankan `package_images` dan `package_prices` yang sudah ada di DB
   - `app/tours/page.tsx`, `app/tours/[slug]/page.tsx`, `app/tours/from-surabaya/page.tsx`, `app/tours/from-bali/page.tsx` → pakai `getTours()` dari `lib/data-access.ts` (baca DB)
   - `app/sitemap.ts` → baca dari SSOT canonical_paths (51 rute) — single-source
   - **[P1.5.4 routing decision]**: Put keputusan — ambil path pragmatis: **tetap flat `/tours/[slug]`** untuk minimasi refactor, tetapi tambah canonical redirect dari SSOT nested path ke flat (via `canonical_redirects`). Jika nanti SEO butuh nested, baru refactor.
   - **Validation:** `npm run audit:prd` + bandingkan `/api/tours` output dengan `getSSOT().tour_pages.length`

input.old_string:
## 6. Urutan Eksekusi yang Disarankan

Sprint A (Klaim ≠ Kenyataan) **→** Sprint B (Data Unifikasi) **→** Sprint C (Package page tuntas) **→** Sprint D (Cleanup) **→** Sprint E (CMS).

**Jangan lompat Sprint A.** Kalau MAGMA + aggregateRating masih bohong, semua kerja visual/struktur di Sprint C tidak berguna karena AI engines (Perplexity, ChatGPT, Claude) akan mendiskualifikasi JVTO dari jawaban volcano tour queries karena "low factual reliability signal".
input.new_string:
## 6. Urutan Eksekusi yang Disarankan (Updated)

**Sprint A (No Lies)** → **Sprint A+ (Adopt SSOT v4.0)** → **Sprint B (Data Unifikasi)** → **Sprint C (Package page tuntas + SSOT wiring)** → **Sprint D (Cleanup)** → **Sprint E (CMS).**

**Rasional urutan:**

1. **Sprint A tetap pertama** — integritas klaim (MAGMA/reviews/rates) adalah prasyarat kredibilitas. Tanpa ini, SSOT pun tidak bisa dipercaya outputnya.
2. **Sprint A+ adalah unlock utama** — setelah SSOT v4.0 jadi build-time source, Sprint B-C-D semua lebih cepat karena ada satu source of truth yang konsisten.
3. **Sprint B berubah konteks** — bukan cuma migrasi dari `jvtoData.ts` ke DB, tapi rekonsiliasi 3-way (SSOT canonical + DB operational + deprecate static TS).
4. **Sprint C dapat power tambahan** — Ijen Digital Health + Lifetime Travel Credit surfacing langsung kasih USP yang tersembunyi.

**Jangan lompat Sprint A.** Jangan juga lompat Sprint A+. SSOT v4.0 JSON sudah ditandai `"status": "READY_FOR_IMPLEMENTATION"` sejak 2026-03-16 — membiarkannya tidak terpakai adalah sunk-cost 5 sprint kerja data modeling.

---

## 8. Korelasi 3 Dokumen → 1 Thesis Eksekusi

> **Single-line thesis:** *JVTO success adalah fungsi dari seberapa ketat Human Trust signals (Master Map) di-kawinkan dengan AI/Entity signals (Blueprint §2) melalui satu data graph kanonikal (SSOT v4.0), dan di-render dengan disiplin "Emotion First, Logic Second" (Blueprint §1).*

**Operasionalisasi:**

| Dokumen | Kontribusi | Aksi Terkunci |
|---|---|---|
| **Master Map** | Taxonomy + priority order | Sprint C 17-modul package page; Priority fixed 1-7 tetap acuan |
| **Unified Commercial Blueprint** | Perilaku rendering + dual-audience | Sprint A+ claim-evidence graph; Sprint C Emotion-first hero revision; §7 production priorities jadi checklist Sprint D |
| **SSOT v4.0 JSON** | Data kanonikal + 51 rute + 52 asset + 9 klaim | Sprint A+ adopt; Sprint B hydrate DB; Sprint C wire SSOT ke 5 komponen baru; Sprint D audit script berbasis SSOT |

Setelah Sprint A+ selesai, setiap halaman baru/pengeditan berikutnya **wajib** mengonsumsi dari `lib/ssot/index.ts` bukan dari constant baru. Ini menutup spiral fragmentasi yang dirujuk Blueprint §1.

input.content:
---
name: JVTO SSOT v4.0 Canonical Data Layer
description: The canonical 11,056-line JSON SSOT exists but is NOT yet wired into code. It should be the build-time source of truth for tours, assets, claims, routes.
type: project
---
**File:** `F:\New folder\DOWNLOADS\JVTO_SSOT_v4_0_CLEAN.json`
**Status:** `READY_FOR_IMPLEMENTATION` (per `ssot_meta.phase0_clean: true`, generated 2026-03-16)
**Still NOT copied** into the repo as of 2026-04-19.

## What it contains
- 51 canonical routes (`canonical_context.canonical_paths`) + `route_owner_map` per path
- 9 narrative claims C1–C9 with `evidence_slugs` → asset graph (the "trust graph")
- 14 crew members with numeric_id + kta license slugs
- 14 verification_credentials (NIB, TDUP, HPWKI, SPRIN, etc.)
- 52 assets_inventory entries — each with SHA-256, URL, alt_text, geo_context, last_verified_iso
- Full page architecture (Master_Content_Index, SSOT_Pages, Registry_Pages)
- 16 tour_pages fully structured (SSOT-canonical commercial catalog)
- 5 destination_pages canonical (Bromo, Ijen, Madakaripura, Tumpak Sewu, Papuma)
- `operational_logic.health_protocol`: `system_url: https://health.mountijen.com`, `logic_gate: "No Valid QR Code = No Access"`, 4 data_points (SpO2/BP/HR/Respiratory)
- `operational_logic.financial_policy`: Lifetime Travel Credit Guarantee — 48h cutoff, lifetime validity, fully transferable
- 8 canonical_redirects (e.g., `/reviews → /why-jvto/reviews`)

## Why it matters
- `lib/jvtoData.ts` (19 tours) + PostgreSQL (22 packages) + SSOT v4.0 (16 tours) = three divergent sources. SSOT v4.0 is the commercial canonical.
- `lib/ssot-media-registry.ts` (23 assets) is a subset — SSOT has 52 assets with SHA-256.
- `lib/verificationData.ts` forensic hashes are a subset — SSOT has complete credentials.
- Hardcoded Ijen health screening UI misses `health.mountijen.com` QR-gate differentiator (it's in SSOT).
- Lifetime Travel Credit USP is hidden in /policy (should be on package page per SSOT).

## Route structure mismatch
- Current: flat `/tours/[slug]` (e.g., `/tours/bromo-2d1n`)
- SSOT canonical: nested `/tours/from-surabaya/bromo-2d1n`
- Plan recommends: keep flat but deploy 301 redirects from nested → flat via `next.config.mjs`

## Integration path (Sprint A+ in plan)
1. Copy SSOT JSON into `lib/ssot/jvto-ssot-v4.json`
2. `lib/ssot/index.ts` with helpers: `getSSOT()`, `getClaim(id)`, `getAsset(slug)`, `getTourPage(route)`, `getOperationalLogic()`
3. `components/ClaimBadge.tsx` + `components/SSOTImage.tsx` wrappers
4. Deploy `canonical_redirects` via `next.config.mjs`

## How to apply
Before proposing any new page content or component that renders brand copy, trust claim, asset image, or operational policy — first check `getSSOT()` helpers. If the data exists there, use it. Do not create new constants parallel to SSOT.

content.text:
Konsolidasi selesai. Ringkasan temuan:

## Hasil Review & Konsolidasi 3 Dokumen

**1. JVTO Master Map** = taxonomy 4-layer (Strategy/Structure/Visual/Data)
**2. Unified Commercial System Blueprint** = perilaku rendering, menambah 2 konsep kunci:
- **"Emotion First, Logic Second"** (hero harus menangkap wonder dulu)
- **Dual-Audience table** (Human Signal ↔ AI/Entity Signal 1:1 pairing)
**3. SSOT v4.0 JSON** (11,056 baris, status `READY_FOR_IMPLEMENTATION`) = **data kanonikal yang hilang**

## Korelasi Kunci untuk Goal-Optimization

Gap terbesar bukan halaman/konten — **tiga data source tidak nyambung**. SSOT v4.0 sudah menghubungkan tiap gambar (SHA-256) + tiap klaim (9 C-IDs → evidence_slugs) + tiap rute (51 paths + 8 redirects), tetapi **kode belum mengonsumsi itu sama sekali**.

## Penemuan Penting dari SSOT v4.0 yang Belum Disurface di UI

1. **Ijen Digital Health Security** — `health.mountijen.com` dengan QR-gate logic ("No QR = No Access"), 4 data points (SpO2/BP/HR/Respiratory). USP safety yang tersembunyi.
2. **Lifetime Travel Credit Guarantee** — 48h cutoff, validitas seumur hidup, fully transferable. USP booking yang terkubur di `/policy`.
3. **9 Narrative Claims C1–C9** dengan evidence_slugs → fondasi "proof-on-demand chip" yang menuntaskan Blueprint Dual-Audience.
4. **Route canonical** mismatch: SSOT nested (`/tours/from-surabaya/bromo-2d1n`) vs kode flat (`/tours/bromo-2d1n`).
5. **52 aset** dengan SHA-256 — lebih komplet dari `lib/ssot-media-registry.ts` (23 aset).

## Update Plan

Plan file [e-users-java-volcano-downloads-jvto-mas-zany-honey.md](../../../Users/JAVA VOLCANO/.claude/plans/e-users-java-volcano-downloads-jvto-mas-zany-honey.md) diupdate:
- Section 0 baru: Konsolidasi 3 dokumen
- Section 1B baru: Korelasi Goal-Optimization
- Pain point baru **P1.5** (SSOT v4.0 belum dipakai — 6 sub-issues)
- Sprint baru **A+**: Adopt SSOT v4.0 sebagai build-time source
- Sprint C diperluas: Ijen QR-gate + Lifetime Travel Credit surfacing
- Section 8 baru: single-line thesis mengikat 3 dokumen

## Langkah Strategis Terurut Baru

Sprint A (No Lies) → **Sprint A+ (Adopt SSOT)** → Sprint B (Data Unifikasi) → Sprint C (Package + USP surfacing) → Sprint D (Cleanup) → Sprint E (CMS).

Mulai dari Sprint A atau Sprint A+ dulu?
